Catalog/ENT/Metic Airway Dilation Catheter
👂 ENT SolutionsREF: BC0524A✓ Brochure Verified

Metic Airway Dilation Catheter

METIC · Airway Management

The Metic™ Balloon Dilation System is a minimally invasive airway management solution designed to safely dilate airway strictures while minimizing mucosal trauma. Developed in partnership with ENT surgeons, the system integrates a custom balloon catheter and stylet optimized for precise placement and controlled radial dilation of resistant lesions.

MaterialNon-compliant high-pressure balloon

Metic Airway Dilation Catheter

Technical Blueprint SpecificationClinical Value
Catalog Number BC0524A
Balloon Diameter: 5mm, Balloon Length: 24mm, Units: 5 per box
Catalog Number BC0724A
Balloon Diameter: 7mm, Balloon Length: 24mm, Units: 5 per box
Catalog Number BC0924A
Balloon Diameter: 9mm, Balloon Length: 24mm, Units: 5 per box
Catalog Number BC1040A
Balloon Diameter: 10mm, Balloon Length: 40mm, Units: 5 per box
Catalog Number BC1240A
Balloon Diameter: 12mm, Balloon Length: 40mm, Units: 5 per box
Catalog Number BC1440A
Balloon Diameter: 14mm, Balloon Length: 40mm, Units: 5 per box
Catalog Number BC1640A
Balloon Diameter: 16mm, Balloon Length: 40mm, Units: 5 per box

Inflation Type

Controlled radial dilation with precise inflation and pressure regulation

System Profile

Low-profile system designed to cross narrow stenoses

Compliance

Non-compliant design maintaining consistent diameter through multiple dilations

Primary Material

Non-compliant high-pressure balloon

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

The Metic Balloon Dilation System is designed to safely dilate airway strictures with minimal mucosal trauma. Developed in partnership with ENT Surgeons, it offers a safe, elegant, minimally invasive solution for airway management.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Metic Airway Dilation Catheter, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Metic Airway Dilation Catheter is constructed using Non-compliant high-pressure balloon, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
